'''zawate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zestlessly|zestlessly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-w-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zestlessly|zestlessly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zawate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zawate|zawate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zawatesher|zawatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zawatesherĂ«m|zawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zawatero|zawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zawateshĂ«|zawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zawateshĂ«m|zawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizawatero|gokizawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizawateshĂ«|gokizawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizawateshĂ«m|gokizawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozawankerom|gozawankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozawankeshĂ«|gozawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozawankeshĂ«m|gozawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozawankeya|gozawankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zawaterom|zawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zawatemu|zawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zawateya|zawateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizawaterom|gokizawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizawatemu|gokizawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizawateya|gokizawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zawawate|zawawate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zawawatesher|zawawatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zawawatesherĂ«m|zawawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zawawatero|zawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zawawateshĂ«|zawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zawawateshĂ«m|zawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizawawatero|gokizawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizawawateshĂ«|gokizawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizawawateshĂ«m|gokizawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozawawankerom|gozawawankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozawawankeshĂ«|gozawawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozawawankeshĂ«m|gozawawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozawawankeya|gozawawankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zawawaterom|zawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zawawatemu|zawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zawawateya|zawawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizawawaterom|gokizawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizawawatemu|gokizawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizawawateya|gokizawawateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zĂŠwĂŠte|zĂŠwĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zĂŠwĂŠtesher|zĂŠwĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m|zĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠwĂŠtero|zĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|zĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|zĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠwĂŠtero|gokizĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|gokizĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozĂŠwĂŠnkerom|gozĂŠwĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozĂŠwĂŠnkeya|gozĂŠwĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠwĂŠterom|zĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠwĂŠtemu|zĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zĂŠwĂŠteya|zĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠwĂŠterom|gokizĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠwĂŠtemu|gokizĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizĂŠwĂŠteya|gokizĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zafwafte|zafwafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zafwaftesher|zafwaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafwaftesherĂ«m|zafwaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafwaftero|zafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zafwafteshĂ«|zafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafwafteshĂ«m|zafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafwaftero|gokizafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizafwafteshĂ«|gokizafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafwafteshĂ«m|gokizafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozafwafnkerom|gozafwafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozafwafnkeshĂ«|gozafwafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafwafnkeshĂ«m|gozafwafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozafwafnkeya|gozafwafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafwafterom|zafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafwaftemu|zafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zafwafteya|zafwafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafwafterom|gokizafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafwaftemu|gokizafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizafwafteya|gokizafwafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
